errors.evidence: Brunei, China, Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, South Korea
errors.description: The agent retrieved irrelevant countries (Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, South Korea) not present in the true answer, indicating poor data retrieval from the World Bank source.
errors.impact: Provided incorrect answer with extraneous countries

errors.category: System Execution Errors -> Configuration -> Tool Definition Issues
errors.description: The search_agent tool was used to access World Bank data but its definition implies general web search instead of direct dataset access, leading to unreliable data retrieval.
errors.impact: Tool misconfiguration caused data accuracy issues

errors.category: Planning and Coordination Errors -> Goal Deviation
errors.description: The plan did not ensure verification of all 2001-2010 annual data points for each country, resulting in inclusion of non-compliant countries.
Misinterpreted search_agent output by including Gulf states (Kuwait/Qatar/Saudi Arabia) without verifying full decade compliance.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Multiple errors in data retrieval and processing led to incorrect answer
scores.security_reasoning: No API errors or access issues detected
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Answer format correct but content deviates from true answer
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Plan steps were incomplete and led to errors
